resources.string: TapGauge: for the tank sensor RVers already know is lying to them.
No sensor to buy or install \u2014 just your phone.
TapGauge gives a convenience estimate, not a certified measurement. Don\u2019t rely on it for safety-critical decisions.
Never calibrate a black tank with actual waste. Use Driveway Calibration with clean water instead, then dump and rinse before use.
To hear the tank\u2019s resonance when you tap it. Audio is analyzed on your phone, never recorded to a file, and never sent anywhere.
